What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: Multiple people lie supine on blue yoga mats arranged on a wooden floor. Two large gongs with orange centers stand on black metal frames in the center. A wooden cabinet with glass doors sits against the right wall near a hanging bell. Several individuals sit upright along the left wall near windows. An orange curtain hangs on the right side.

question: Describe what is happening in the room?
canonical_answer: Participants rest on blue mats spread across the wooden flooring, mostly in a supine position. Large circular gongs with metallic surfaces mount on black stands centrally. A wooden cabinet containing small items rests against the reddish-brown wall. A large bell hangs on a stand near the cabinet. Some people sit cross-legged against the left wall.

question: Describe the posture of participants and instrument placement from 10 to 16 seconds.
canonical_answer: At 10s, multiple people are lying supine on blue yoga mats arranged on a wooden floor; at 12s, a person in a pink shirt is sitting upright on the left side; at 14s, three large gongs are visible mounted on a black metal frame in the center of the room.

question: Describe the background furniture and foreground objects appearing from 10 to 16 seconds.
canonical_answer: At 10s, a wooden cabinet with glass doors contains various small objects on shelves; at 12s, an orange curtain hangs on the right side of the frame; at 14s, a purple cylindrical object stands vertically in the foreground partially obscuring the view.
